dashboard.title: Oil Shock API Health Monitoring
dashboard.description: Comprehensive health dashboard for all data source APIs

targets.name: System Health
targets.queryString: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN status = 'OK' THEN 1 END) = COUNT(*) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as healthy FROM (SELECT DISTINCT feed_name, provider FROM api_health_metrics WHERE attempted_at >= datetime('now', '-1 hour'))

panels.title: Per-Feed Status Panel
panels.description: Real-time status for each API feed

targets.name: Feed Status
targets.queryString:
SELECT
  afr.feed_name as 'Feed Name',
  afr.display_name as 'Display Name',
  afr.provider as 'Provider',
  CASE
    WHEN ahm_latest.status IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'
    WHEN ahm_latest.status = 'success' THEN 'OK'
    WHEN ahm_latest.status = 'failure' THEN 'ERROR'
    WHEN ahm_latest.status = 'timeout' THEN 'TIMEOUT'
  END as 'Status',
  ahm_latest.latency_ms as 'Latest Latency (ms)',
  CAST(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ahm.status != 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(ahm.id), 0), 1) AS INTEGER) as 'Error Rate (%) 1h',
  MAX(CASE WHEN ahm.status = 'success' THEN ahm.attempted_at END) as 'Last Success'
FROM api_feed_registry afr
LEFT JOIN api_health_metrics ahm ON afr.feed_name = ahm.feed_name AND ahm.attempted_at >= datetime('now', '-1 hour')
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT feed_name, provider, status, latency_ms, attempted_at
  FROM api_health_metrics
  WHERE (feed_name, attempted_at) IN (
    SELECT feed_name, MAX(attempted_at)
    FROM api_health_metrics
    WHERE attempted_at >= datetime('now', '-24 hours')
    GROUP BY feed_name
  )
) ahm_latest ON afr.feed_name = ahm_latest.feed_name
WHERE afr.enabled = 1
GROUP BY afr.feed_name, afr.display_name, afr.provider
ORDER BY afr.feed_name

targets.name: EIA WTI
targets.queryString:
SELECT
  attempted_at as time,
  latency_ms
FROM api_health_metrics
WHERE feed_name = 'eia_wti' AND status = 'success'
AND attempted_at >= datetime('now', '-24 hours')
ORDER BY attempted_at DESC
LIMIT 1440

panels.title: Error Rate Gauges (Last Hour)
panels.description: Error rate (%) for each feed - last hour

targets.name: EIA WTI Error Rate
targets.queryString:
SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status != 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as value
FROM api_health_metrics
WHERE feed_name = 'eia_wti' AND attempted_at >= datetime('now', '-1 hour')

panels.title: Data Staleness Check (Last Successful)
panels.description: Hours since last successful data point per feed

targets.name: Data Age
targets.queryString:
SELECT
  afr.feed_name as 'Feed',
  afr.display_name as 'Display Name',
  CASE
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ahm.status = 'success' THEN ahm.attempted_at END) IS NULL THEN 'No data'
    ELSE CAST(ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(MAX(CASE WHEN ahm.status = 'success' THEN ahm.attempted_at END))) * 24, 1) AS TEXT) || ' hours ago'
  END as 'Last Success',
  CASE
    WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ahm.status = 'success' THEN ahm.attempted_at END) IS NULL THEN 'Critical'
    WHEN (julianday('now') - julianday(MAX(CASE WHEN ahm.status = 'success' THEN ahm.attempted_at END))) * 24 > afr.freshness_window_hours THEN 'Stale'
    ELSE 'Fresh'
  END as 'Freshness Status'
FROM api_feed_registry afr
LEFT JOIN api_health_metrics ahm ON afr.feed_name = ahm.feed_name
WHERE afr.enabled = 1
GROUP BY afr.feed_name, afr.display_name, afr.freshness_window_hours
ORDER BY afr.feed_name

panels.title: Request Success Rate (24h rolling)
panels.description: Success rate by feed over 24 hours

targets.name: Success Rate
targets.queryString:
SELECT
  afr.display_name as Feed,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ahm.status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(ahm.id), 0), 1) as 'Success Rate %'
FROM api_feed_registry afr
LEFT JOIN api_health_metrics ahm ON afr.feed_name = ahm.feed_name AND ahm.attempted_at >= datetime('now', '-24 hours')
WHERE afr.enabled = 1
GROUP BY afr.feed_name, afr.display_name
ORDER BY 'Success Rate %' ASC

target.queryString:
SELECT
  MAX(attempted_at) as time,
  'API Failure: ' || feed_name as text
FROM api_health_metrics
WHERE status != 'success' AND attempted_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days')
GROUP BY feed_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
